structured.title: Reading Discussion On The Well Of Ascension
structured.overview: The conversation centers on a reading of a text from *The Well of Ascension*. The speakers discuss the ending of the log book, the mystery of what happened at the Well of Ascension, and possible reasons the Lord Ruler changed so drastically. They note that the translated record ends the night before the group enters the cavern, which leaves Vin frustrated because the story feels incomplete and unsatisfying. One speaker also jokes that becoming too fond of reading might turn her into a scholar.

apps_results.content:
## Translation finished
- The log ends at the cavern entry.
- Vin is told the translation is complete.
- Missing last part causes frustration.

## Vin questions the ending
- She expected more after the log.
- Wonders why no further entries exist.
- Suspects something changed at the Well of Ascension.

## Sazed explains possible reasons
- The ruler may have saved the world.
- He may have taken power selfishly.
- Or simply stopped writing after success.

## Immortality makes records less necessary
- Sazed says immortality reduces need for posterity.
- Vin finds this ending unsatisfying.
- Sazed jokes she may become a scholar.

## Next steps
- Keep searching for the missing truth.
- Speak privately about the discovered details.
